sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9227" key="a)nomoiogw/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνομοιο-γώνιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9227.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with dissimilar angles,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:216:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">216.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
